name: agentmemory
description: Persistent memory for your AI agent — decisions, context, goals, and learnings that persist across every session.
long_description:
agentmemory.md gives your agent a brain that persists across every session. It stores decisions with rationale, project context, failed experiments, goals, tasks, and preferences — and retrieves the right context using hybrid search over a knowledge graph.

Requires a self-hosted agentmemory server reachable via Tailscale. See https://agentmemory.md for setup instructions.

tailscale_ip.title: Server IP Address
tailscale_ip.description: Your agentmemory server's Tailscale IP address (e.g. 100.x.x.x). Find it by running `tailscale ip -4` on your server.
